stocks.nameEn: The Chugoku Electric Power Co., Inc.

headlines.title: Japanese Yen gives away gains with markets awaiting clarity on Iran’s war
Nikkei ends nearly 3% higher on renewed hopes for Middle East peace
Japan's Nikkei ends nearly 3% higher on renewed hopes for Middle East peace
Nikkei Surges Into 66,000 Range as Kioxia Becomes Japan's Most Valuable Company
MetroResidences Japan eyes tenfold expansion to accommodate expats
What is driving Japanese Yen toward intervention levels despite imminent BoJ hike?
Euro gains against Japanese Yen on more ECB interest rate hike hopes

marketTone.ko: 일본 증시는 중동 평화에 대한 새로운 기대감에 힘입어 닛케이 지수가 3% 가까이 급등하며 강세를 보였습니다. 그러나 엔화는 이란 전쟁 관련 불확실성 속에서 상승분을 반납하고 유로화 강세에 밀려 개입 수준에 근접하는 약세를 지속했습니다. 일본은행의 금리 인상 임박 전망에도 불구하고 엔화 약세가 이어지며 시장의 주요 리스크 요인으로 부상하고 있습니다.
marketTone.en: Japanese equities saw a strong day, with the Nikkei 225 surging nearly 3% on renewed hopes for Middle East peace. However, the Japanese Yen continued to weaken, giving away gains and approaching intervention levels, driven by market anticipation of clarity on the Iran conflict and Euro strength. This persistent Yen depreciation poses a notable risk despite expectations of an imminent Bank of Japan rate hike.
